nasb.text: Then he said, “If they have come out for peace, take them alive; or if they have come out for war, take them alive.”

esv.text: He said, “If they have come out for peace, take them alive. Or if they have come out for war, take them alive.”

cnv.text: 便．哈達說：“如果他們是為了求和出來，你們要活捉他們；如果他們是為了爭戰出來，你們也要活捉他們。”

ccb.text: 便·哈达说：“不管他们是来求和还是求战，都要生擒他们！”
